title: Fluffy Greek Eggplant Curry
description: A tangy, fluffy curry that blends Greek flavors with a splash of enchilada sauce and a spicy tadka, perfect for a romantic dinner.
instructions: Heat 1 tbsp olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the diced onion, minced garlic, and grated ginger; sauté until the onion is translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the cubed eggplant and cook for 3 minutes, stirring frequently.
Pour in the enchilada sauce, stir, and bring to a gentle simmer.
Add the coconut milk, stir well, and simmer for 10–12 minutes until the eggplant is tender.
In a small saucepan, heat a teaspoon of olive oil and add cumin, coriander, turmeric, and garam masala; fry for 30 seconds until fragrant (tadka).
Stir the tadka into the curry, season with 1 tsp salt and a tablespoon of lemon juice, and let the mixture reduce for 3–4 minutes.
Garnish with chopped cilantro and serve over a bed of fluffy rice or with warm crusty bread.
